Additional information regarding various ways to identify dually enrolled populations, refer to the 
document CCW Technical Guidance: Options in Determining Dual Eligibles. There are 12 monthly 
variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name correspond with the month 
(e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December).
